title: The social and clinical impact of the COVID-19 epidemic on the Strasbourg lung transplant cohort: A single-center retrospective cohort study.
author: Renaud-Picard B Gallais F Riou M Chatron E Degot T Freudenberger S Porzio M Schuller A Stauder J Hirschi S Kessler R
content: S-EPMC7646014 PMC7646014 The social and clinical impact of the COVID-19 epidemic on the Strasbourg lung transplant cohort: A single-center retrospective cohort study. The clinical and social impacts of the COVID-19 epidemic on lung transplant (LTx) recipients remain poorly known. We aimed
